name: GYRE THERAPEUTICS, INC.
business: GYRE THERAPEUTICS is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of small-molecule therapies for organ fibrosis and inflammatory diseases. It generates revenue primarily through sales of ETUARY, Etorel, Contiva, and certain generic drugs in the PRC. Distributors are its direct customers.

exposures.sentence: We generate revenue primarily through sales of ETUARY, Etorel, Contiva and certain generic drugs in the PRC.

Our strategy is to leverage our established commercial portfolio to support and de-risk the advancement of late-stage product candidates, expand approved products into additional indications, and build a diversified pipeline targeting significant unmet medical needs in fibrosis and related inflammatory diseases.

catalysts.event: Submit NDA seeking conditional approval for Hydronidone (CHB-associated liver fibrosis) in the PRC
catalysts.sentence: We currently expect to submit an NDA seeking conditional approval in the first half of 2026, subject to completion of regulatory and technical preparations.

catalysts.event: File U.S. IND for Hydronidone (MASH-associated liver fibrosis) and initiate Phase 2 clinical trial
catalysts.sentence: Pending regulatory feedback, we intend to file a U.S. IND in 2026 and, if the IND becomes effective, initiate a Phase 2 clinical trial.

catalysts.event: Complete Phase 2 clinical trial for F573 (liver injury and liver failure) in the PRC
catalysts.sentence: The Phase 2 clinical trial is expected to be completed in 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate adaptive Phase 2/3 study for ETUARY for RILI indication in the PRC
catalysts.sentence: we expect to initiate an adaptive Phase 2/3 study in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Submit IND application for F528 (COPD) to the NMPA
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate submitting an IND application to the NMPA for F528 in the first quarter of 2027.
